practiceChallenge.title: Fill in the merge rule
practiceChallenge.description: Complete the helper so it describes what to do when sorted intervals overlap or stay separate.
hints: Most merge-interval problems start by sorting by start time.
Overlap means extend the current interval.
No overlap means save the current interval and start a new one.
practiceChallenge.successMessage: Nice work. You rebuilt the main merge rule for intervals.
practiceChallenge.retryMessage: Not yet. Recheck the first sort step and what each overlap case should do.

blanks.label: What to do when intervals overlap
What to do when intervals do not overlap
